creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text: Author: jkois Date: Fri Aug 3 16:02:47 2012 New Revision: 39299 URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/39299 Log: PR: www/169836 Add "Unixworx System Design" (based in Vancouver, BC) to the list of FreeBSD consultants. Requested by: Glenn Graham Modified: head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml Modified: head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml ============================================================================== --- head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml Fri Aug 3 15:40:31 2012 (r39298) +++ head/share/sgml/commercial.consult.xml Fri Aug 3 16:02:47 2012 (r39299) @@ -1226,6 +1226,25 @@ + + UnixWorX System Design + http://www.unixworx.ca/ + + UnixWorX System Design is a Vancouver, BC based BSD consulting firm + established in 1994. For over 20 years we've provided commercial + support for BSD including FreeBSD, NetBSD and OpenBSD. Our + specialties include Web Servers (Apache and TomCat), Database, + Content Management Systems (CMS), Email servers such as Sendmail + and Postfix, DNS (BIND 8 and 9), Firewalls (PF and IPF), Routing, + as well as application development and Perl / C++ Programing. We + operate our own server collocation facility situated on a + GIG-E Backbone. Additionally, the founder of the company, + Glenn Graham, is an author for O'Reilly Publishing. We welcome + new business! For more information, we invite you to visit + our website. + + + AspenWorks, Ltd. http://www.aspenworks.com/ _______________________________________________ svn-doc-all@freebsd.org mailing list http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/svn-doc-all To unsubscribe, send any mail to "svn-doc-all-unsubscribe@freebsd.org"
